action_set_definitions.name: get_restaurant_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves general restaurant operating parameters, including business hours, Large Party Threshold (LPT) policies, and SOPs for semi-private events.

example_output.semi_private_sop: Events displacing >2 tables require specific MDR configuration.

action_set_definitions.name: get_table_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a comprehensive list of all tables in the restaurant, their room assignment (e.g., MDR, PDR), and their maximum guest capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: get_reservations_by_date
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves all bookings (Inquiries, Confirmed, Definite) for a specific date to check for conflicts and retrieve reservation IDs.

action_set_definitions.name: update_reservation_record
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a reservation's status, assigned tables, seating time, and contract/dietary details in the system.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the reservation.

status.description: The new status of the reservation.

table_ids.description: List of table IDs assigned to this booking.

menu_tier.description: The selected menu tier (e.g., Tier 2 Prix Fixe).

fb_minimum.description: The agreed Food & Beverage minimum amount.

dietary_notes.description: Documentation of allergies and dietary requirements.

state_description.tables: A list of all tables in the restaurant and their fixed properties.
state_description.active_reservations: A list of current confirmed bookings containing table_id, customer_name, start_time, and duration.
state_description.business_hours: The opening and closing times of the restaurant.
state_description.current_system_time: The current simulated time used to validate booking requests.
state_description.waiting_list: Customers waiting for a table if the restaurant is at full capacity.
